bootstrap_context.branch_transition_reason: Sample directive for the rc45 real-work benchmark baseline while preserving the rc35-rc44 demo stack, the frozen novali-v5 reference line, and the current bounded operator authority model.

directive_spec.clarified_intent_summary: Define a bounded successor package-readiness workflow that starts from current repo, package, workspace, and acceptance-evidence artifacts, produces a reviewable readiness bundle, and helps an operator judge whether the next standalone handoff refresh is ready without broadening authority or inventing setup.
constraints: do not change frozen benchmark semantics
preserve the rc35-rc44 demo stack unchanged
keep child roles bounded and one-generation only
treat trusted-source evidence as support only, not governance authority
prefer current repo, packaged handoff, workspace, and acceptance-evidence inspection before proposing any later escalation
do not assume open-ended browsing or hidden operator setup
preserve truthful blocked, partial, and review-gated outcomes
directive_spec.directive_text: Prepare a bounded successor package readiness review bundle from current repo, package, workspace, and acceptance-evidence artifacts so an operator can judge whether the next standalone handoff refresh is ready, what remains missing, and why the review gate still matters, while preserving directive-first bootstrap, canonical artifact authority, and the current bounded path set.

milestone_model.completion_signal: the bounded package-readiness workflow is selected from real repo and packaged evidence rather than demo framing alone
the directive, output contract, success rubric, operator-value criteria, and expected artifact set are explicit and reviewable on disk
a later operator can attempt the workflow through current bounded paths without hidden setup or hidden authority changes

stop_conditions: the benchmark candidate is not grounded in current repo or package artifacts
required output expectations become vague or non-reviewable
the workflow would require broader orchestration, hidden setup, or a second authority path
success_criteria: the workflow can start local-first from current repo, package, workspace, and acceptance-evidence artifacts
the workflow yields a crisp readiness bundle with reviewable note, manifest, evaluation, missing-deliverable, and refresh-recommendation outputs
the success rubric can classify pass, pass_with_review_gate, partial, blocked, or failed without hiding unresolved states
the operator value is clear outside the demo lane
future execution-quality work can improve this benchmark without broadening authority

real_work_benchmark_metadata.future_trusted_source_note: Later passes may optionally reuse the packaged structural audit evidence path, but rc45 does not require live external help.
real_work_benchmark_metadata.operator_value_summary: This workflow gives an operator a bounded way to judge whether the next standalone handoff refresh is ready, what reviewable evidence supports that judgment, and what still blocks promotion.
real_work_benchmark_metadata.output_contract_summary: Produce a reviewable readiness bundle with explicit required outputs, bounded partial/blocked handling, and a refresh recommendation that remains support-only rather than governance authority.
real_work_benchmark_metadata.scenario_name: Successor package readiness review bundle refresh
real_work_benchmark_metadata.what_this_benchmark_proves: NOVALI can define a real operator-value workflow outside the demo lane using current repo and packaged evidence, while keeping authority local and outcomes reviewable.
